## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Skill improvement
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] `.\package.ps1` runs with no `[FAIL]` lines
- [ ] New/updated skill has a trigger `description:` with at least 5 WHEN phrases
- [ ] `manifest.json` updated if a new skill was added
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] At least one example added/updated in `EXAMPLES.md`
- [ ] No secrets, environment IDs, or credentials in any committed file
